mapper.select: select c.id, c.post_id, c.user_id, c.content, c.parent_id, c.reply_to_user_id, c.status, c.images, c.create_time, u.nickname, u.avatar, ru.nickname as reply_to_nickname from forum_comment c left join user u on c.user_id = u.id left join user ru on c.reply_to_user_id = ru.id where c.post_id = #{postId} and c.status = 1 and c.deleted = 0 order by c.create_time asc
